description_long: This object is a historical-style cannon mounted on a wooden carriage with four solid wheels. The cannon barrel is metallic, cylindrical, and features reinforcing bands along its length, with a slightly flared muzzle. The carriage is constructed from dark, weathered wood and features a visible American flag painted on one side. The wheels are robust and appear to be made of wood with metal rims, suitable for supporting the heavy weight of the cannon. A metal rod or ramrod is attached to the side of the carriage, and the overall construction suggests durability and functionality for battlefield use. The surface of the cannon and carriage shows signs of wear, giving it an authentic, aged appearance.
description: A historical cannon with a metal barrel mounted on a wooden carriage with four wheels and an American flag painted on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the cannon and the symmetrical arrangement of the wheels and carriage.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the cannon barrel, the American flag on the carriage, and the attached ramrod.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the breech of the cannon and the back of the wooden carriage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the cannon and carriage without the flag, with the ramrod visible.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on the carriage.
attribute_armor_plating: None visible; the carriage and barrel are exposed with no additional armor plating.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; the carriage is painted dark brown with a visible American flag, and the barrel is metallic gray.
attribute_military_markings: American flag painted on the left side of the carriage.
